title: RealReal Earnings Call Highlights Growth and Margin Gains
text: The RealReal's Q1 2026 earnings call highlighted strong growth momentum and significant margin gains. Management discussed the sustainability of growth in high-value categories, with average order value reaching $646, up 15% year-over-year. The company emphasized the durability of demand in premium luxury items through economic cycles. Strategies to improve cash flow focus on supply unlocking (reducing inventory holding times), operational efficiency (Athena automation reducing per-unit costs), and customer retention (MyCloset features). Active buyer growth of 10% year-over-year indicates strong platform engagement and retention. The company's three-pillar strategy (supply unlocking, service obsession, operational excellence) is resonating with analysts and investors. Management reiterated confidence in the company's path to sustained profitability with adjusted EBITDA margins reaching 8% at midpoint of 2026 guidance, compared to 6.1% in full-year 2025. Analysts inquired about sustainability of growth rates and management's ability to maintain margin expansion while continuing to invest in supply unlocking and technology. Management expressed confidence in the company's ability to maintain double-digit GMV growth while expanding margins through operational leverage.
